targets.boundary: Company-wide operational greenhouse gas emissions from global facilities and data centers.
targets.notes: Target to reduce operational greenhouse gas emissions by 75% between 2017 and 2020.
targets.title: 75% reduction in operational GHG emissions by 2020 vs 2017

targets.boundary: Company-wide value chain emissions across Scopes 1, 2, and 3.
targets.notes: Commitment to reach net zero greenhouse gas emissions across the value chain by 2030.
targets.title: Net zero greenhouse gas emissions across value chain by 2030
